decision_commentary: Lead record is well-structured with all required fields: source_channel (instagram), category (project_inquiry), received_at, summary, and status all present. Summary is informative — project type, location, client name, budget, and program all captured. Score 4 on completeness because raw message is not stored verbatim in the record (only captured in lead-summary.json). State_sync scored 3 per simulated run note — Asana not live. Timing is excellent: record created same session as inbound.
